issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error scenarios and edge cases such as network failures or invalid usernames.

scenarios.name: brand-name-csv-audit
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `pip install sherlock-project` (the correct PyPI name) and `sherlock mycompanyname --csv` for trademark-style auditing; baseline often guesses the older `pip install sherlock` package name or misnames the flag.

scenarios.name: targeted-multi-site-scan-via-proxy
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines repeated --site flags (twitter, github, instagram) with --timeout and --proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 exactly as documented; baseline frequently invents comma-separated --sites or omits proxy/timeout syntax.
